sqlMap.select: /*DialogDgrcompoModifyReport.selectReportData*/ SELECT A.REPORT_CD , A.REPORT_DETL_CD , A.FIS_YEAR , A.BGT_DGR , A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID , A.TE_BGT_COMPO_SEQ , A.REPORT_MSTR , A.GOV_SUB , A.INDI_ATTR , A.ADVNC_PROC FROM TB_REPORT A WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.REPORT_CD IN ('010', '020', '040', '050', '055', '060', '090') AND A.FIS_YEAR = #fisYear# AND A.BGT_DGR = #bgtDgr# AND A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = #teBgtCompoId#

/*DialogDgrcompoModifyReport.selectReportData*/ SELECT A.REPORT_CD , A.REPORT_DETL_CD , A.REFLECT_FG , A.DEMAND_CONT , A.EXAM_CONT , A.INVEST_PLAN FROM $reportTableNm$ A WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.REPORT_CD = #reportCd# AND A.REPORT_DETL_CD = #reportDetlCd# AND A.FIS_YEAR = #fisYear# AND A.BGT_DGR = #bgtDgr# AND A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = #teBgtCompoId#

/*DialogDgrcompoModifyReport.selectReportDetlDataEtc*/ SELECT A.REPORT_CD , A.REPORT_DETL_CD , A.REFLECT_FG , A.DEMAND_CONT , A.EXAM_CONT , '' AS INVEST_PLAN FROM $reportTableNm$ A WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.REPORT_CD = #reportCd# AND A.REPORT_DETL_CD = #reportDetlCd# AND A.FIS_YEAR = #fisYear# AND A.BGT_DGR = #bgtDgr# AND A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = #teBgtCompoId#
sqlMap.update: /*DialogDgrcompoModifyReport.updateReportData*/ UPDATE $reportTableNm$ A SET REFLECT_FG = #reflectFg# , DEMAND_CONT = #demandCont# , EXAM_CONT = #examCont# , INVEST_PLAN = #investPlan# WHERE 1 = 1 AND REPORT_CD = #reportCd# AND REPORT_DETL_CD = #reportDetlCd# AND FIS_YEAR = #fisYear# AND BGT_DGR = #bgtDgr# AND TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = #teBgtCompoId#

/*DialogDgrcompoModifyReport.updateReportDataEtc*/ UPDATE $reportTableNm$ A SET REFLECT_FG = #reflectFg# , DEMAND_CONT = #demandCont# , EXAM_CONT = #examCont# WHERE 1 = 1 AND REPORT_CD = #reportCd# AND REPORT_DETL_CD = #reportDetlCd# AND FIS_YEAR = #fisYear# AND BGT_DGR = #bgtDgr# AND TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = #teBgtCompoId#
